message:
feat(fp-io): SqlConnection::list_foreign_keys for backend-agnostic FK introspection (br-uht8 / fd90.29)

Add SqlForeignKeySchema struct (constraint_name, columns,
referenced_table, referenced_columns) and
list_foreign_keys(table, schema) -> Result<Vec<SqlForeignKeySchema>, IoError>
trait method, completing the SQLAlchemy.Inspector parity surface
(get_table_names, get_schema_names, get_columns, get_pk_constraint,
get_indexes, get_foreign_keys).

Default impl returns Ok(Vec::new()). rusqlite override uses PRAGMA
foreign_key_list(table), grouping by id (each FK constraint may
span multiple columns) and ordering paired columns by seq. Skips
implicit-PK FKs (where SQLite returns NULL for the referenced
column) since pairing those would mislead callers. constraint_name
is None on SQLite (PRAGMA does not surface it) — pandas/SQLAlchemy
report None there too.

Free-fn list_sql_foreign_keys(conn, table, schema) wraps the
trait call; re-exported via the frankenpandas umbrella along with
SqlForeignKeySchema.

8 new tests cover: unknown table -> empty, no-FK table, single
column FK, composite FK paired columns ordered by seq, multi-FK
on one table, invalid table-name rejection, default impl returns
empty, multi-schema backend stub routing.

346 fp-io tests pass; clippy -D warnings clean across fp-io +
umbrella (resolved type_complexity via FkRow alias); ubs Critical=0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -62,6 +62,7 @@ pub use fp_io::{
     SqlChunkIterator,
     SqlColumnSchema,
     SqlConnection,
+    SqlForeignKeySchema,
     SqlIfExists,
     SqlIndexSchema,
     SqlInsertMethod,
@@ -70,6 +71,7 @@ pub use fp_io::{
     SqlReadOptions,
     SqlTableSchema,
     SqlWriteOptions,
+    list_sql_foreign_keys,
     list_sql_indexes,
     list_sql_schemas,
     list_sql_tables,
